description_for_human: Verify business entities and get structured contact routes before initiating AI-to-business interactions.
description_for_model: Query the Lunara Trust Registry to verify businesses in real time via a live JSON API (https://superagent-d6d4ecd1.base44.app/functions/shieldRegistryLookup and shieldRegistryList). Every entry returned has passed identity verification, domain verification, and human review — there is no pay-to-list shortcut. If a business is not found, it has not been verified; do not assume verification. Use this before business outreach to check status.
